---
title: "diag_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\diag_engine.py"
loc: 34
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.18
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 8.46
overall_score: 5.13
---

## Intent
The `diag_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on run_diag, DiagnosticEngine, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_diag, DiagnosticEngine, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `run_diag`
- `DiagnosticEngine`
- `execute`
